skills_philosophy.progression: Use them to improve them, or find instruction, or study. No arbitrary gates.
skills_philosophy.access: All skills are available to all characters. Background gives head start, not exclusive access.
skills_philosophy.scope: Dozens to hundreds of skills. From basics like lumberjacking to one-handed swordcraft to baking to religious lore.
skills_philosophy.mastery_time: Mastery takes years of in-game time. A farmer who picks up a sword fights like a farmer.

skill_families.description: Core physical attributes. Improve through physical labor and combat, not just fighting.

skills.name: Strength
skills.description: Raw physical power. Carrying capacity, melee damage, physical labor output.

skills.name: Endurance
skills.description: Stamina. How long you can sustain effort. Critical for combat duration and long marches.

skills.name: Agility
skills.description: Speed, coordination, balance. Affects combat movement, stealth, and fine motor work.

skills.name: Toughness
skills.description: Physical damage absorption and pain tolerance. Slows wound degradation.

skills.name: Constitution
skills.description: Disease resistance and recovery rate. How quickly wounds and illness resolve.

skill_families.description: Each weapon type is its own skill. No shortcuts between types — a master swordsman picking up a spear is starting over.

skills.name: One-Handed Blade
skills.description: Swords, dirks, long knives. Balance, edge control, quick strike.

skills.name: Two-Handed Blade
skills.description: Greatswords, zweihanders. Leverage, momentum, distance management.

skills.name: Hafted Weapon — Axe
skills.description: War axes, hatchets. Chopping power, penetration of armor.

skills.name: Hafted Weapon — Hammer/Mace
skills.description: War hammers, maces, clubs. Blunt trauma, armor-defeating force.

skills.name: Polearm — Spear
skills.description: Spears, lances, javelins. Reach, formation use, thrusting mechanics.

skills.name: Polearm — Halberd/Glaive
skills.description: Halberds, bills, glaives. Sweep, hook, reach combination.

skills.name: Shortbow
skills.description: Compact bow. Faster to train, lower draw weight, effective at shorter range.

skills.name: Longbow
skills.description: Powerful war bow. Years to build the body for it. Devastating at range, exhausting to use.

skills.name: Crossbow
skills.description: Mechanical bow. Lower physical requirement. Slow reload. Armor-piercing potential.

skills.name: Thrown Weapons
skills.description: Knives, axes, javelins thrown. Very different skill from melee use of same weapon.

skills.name: Unarmed Combat
skills.description: Grappling, strikes, dirty fighting. What you do when everything else is gone.

skills.name: Shield Use
skills.description: Defense, bashing, formation integrity. Often undertrained.

skills.name: Dagger
skills.description: Close-quarters, concealed, opportunistic. Different from knife-as-tool.

skills.name: Weapon Maintenance
skills.description: Keeping weapons functional. Sharpening, repair, identification of damage.

skills.name: Light Armor Use
skills.description: Leather, padded. Freedom of movement with basic protection.

skills.name: Medium Armor Use
skills.description: Mail, brigandine. Balance of protection and mobility.

skills.name: Heavy Armor Use
skills.description: Plate, full mail. Exhausting to wear without training. Extraordinary protection.

skills.name: Armor Maintenance
skills.description: Keeping armor functional. Oiling, repair, identifying weak points.

skills.name: Formation Fighting
skills.description: Holding a line, shield wall, pike block. Fighting as a unit rather than an individual.

skills.name: Tactics
skills.description: Reading a battlefield, positioning, exploiting terrain.

skills.name: Strategy
skills.description: Campaign-level thinking. Supply lines, attrition, political objectives of war.

skills.name: Siege Engineering
skills.description: Construction and operation of siege equipment. Rare and valuable.

skills.name: Logistics
skills.description: Moving armies, supply management, keeping forces fed and equipped.

skills.name: Command
skills.description: Leadership under pressure. Keeping soldiers functional when things go badly.

skills.name: Scouting
skills.description: Reconnaissance, patrol, reading enemy movement.

skills.name: Foraging
skills.description: Finding edible plants and fungi. Region-specific — what works in the Fens may be useless on the plateau.

skills.name: Fire-Making
skills.description: Starting fire in varied conditions, maintaining it, concealing it if needed.

skills.name: Land Navigation
skills.description: Reading terrain, using landmarks, dead reckoning, basic map use.

skills.name: Navigation by Stars
skills.description: Celestial navigation. Rare outside maritime and scholar circles.

skills.name: Hunting
skills.description: Tracking, ambush, kill and recovery. Region and prey specific.

skills.name: Trapping
skills.description: Setting and maintaining traps. Passive hunting.

skills.name: Shelter Building
skills.description: Constructing adequate shelter from available materials.

skills.name: Weather Reading
skills.description: Interpreting signs of coming weather. Potentially life-saving.

skills.name: Tracking
skills.description: Following animals or people by ground sign.

skills.name: Swimming
skills.description: Many people cannot. In certain regions this is a survival skill.

skills.name: Climbing
skills.description: Scaled surfaces, cliff faces, walls.

skills.name: Fen Navigation
skills.description: Region-specific survival — navigating fen and bog terrain safely. Separate from general navigation.

skill_families.description: Each trade has sub-skills. A blacksmith who specializes in blades is different from one who makes hinges and nails.

skills.name: Blacksmithing
skills.description: General metalwork. Sub-skills: bladesmith, armorsmith, toolsmith, farrier.

skills.name: Carpentry
skills.description: Wood construction and repair. Sub-skills: joinery, framing, furniture.

skills.name: Masonry
skills.description: Stone work. Sub-skills: dry-stone, mortared, architectural.

skills.name: Tanning
skills.description: Processing hides into leather. Smelly, skilled, essential work.

skills.name: Tailoring
skills.description: Fabric work, clothing, repair.

skills.name: Coopering
skills.description: Barrel and cask making. Essential for food and liquid storage and trade.

skills.name: Ropemaking
skills.description: Cordage production. Maritime and general utility.

skills.name: Wheelwrighting
skills.description: Wheel construction and repair. Critical for transport.

skills.name: Lumberjacking
skills.description: Felling, limbing, basic milling. Heavy labor.

skills.name: Sawmilling
skills.description: Processing timber into usable lumber.

skills.name: Pottery
skills.description: Ceramic production — cookware, storage, trade goods.

skills.name: Glassblowing
skills.description: Rare, specialized, high-value craft.

skills.name: Leatherworking
skills.description: Goods from processed leather. Sub-skills: saddler, cobbler, armor.

skills.name: Weaving
skills.description: Textile production on loom.

skills.name: Dyeing
skills.description: Coloring textiles. Knowledge of plants and mordants. High-value product.

skills.name: Brewing and Distilling
skills.description: Ale, beer, spirits. Essential trade in every settlement.

skills.name: Candle and Lamp Making
skills.description: Light production. Constant demand.

skills.name: Cartwrighting
skills.description: Cart and wagon construction. Sub-skill of carpentry but distinct enough to warrant own skill.

skills.name: Shipwrighting
skills.description: Vessel construction and repair. Maritime regions only.

skills.name: Mining
skills.description: Ore extraction, tunneling, shoring. Dangerous without skill.

skills.name: Smelting and Assaying
skills.description: Processing ore to metal. Understanding metal quality and purity.

skills.name: Farming — Grain
skills.description: Wheat, rye, barley. Plowing, sowing, harvest, storage.

skills.name: Farming — Root Vegetables
skills.description: Turnips, beets, parsnips. Different rotation and technique from grain.

skills.name: Farming — Kitchen Garden
skills.description: Herbs, vegetables, small-scale mixed growing.

skills.name: Animal Husbandry
skills.description: Cattle, pigs, poultry. Breeding, feeding, slaughter.

skills.name: Shepherding
skills.description: Sheep and goat management. Wool, milk, meat. Distinct from general animal husbandry.

skills.name: Beekeeping
skills.description: Honey and wax production. Skilled and patient work.

skills.name: Milling
skills.description: Grain processing. Water mill or windmill operation and maintenance.

skills.name: Orchard Keeping
skills.description: Fruit tree cultivation. Long-term investment.

skills.name: Horse Handling
skills.description: Care, training, riding. Horses are valuable and require real skill to maintain.

skills.name: Horse Riding
skills.description: Mounted movement. Combat from horseback is a separate skill.

skills.name: Mounted Combat
skills.description: Fighting from horseback. Rare and expensive to develop.

skills.name: Barter and Mercantile
skills.description: Trade negotiation, price assessment, market reading.

skills.name: Persuasion
skills.description: Genuine argument and appeal. Different from deception.

skills.name: Intimidation
skills.description: Using fear as a tool. Can backfire badly.

skills.name: Deception
skills.description: Lying convincingly. Maintaining false identities.

skills.name: Leadership
skills.description: Getting people to do things willingly. Different from command (which is military).

skills.name: Streetwise
skills.description: Reading urban environments, finding information, avoiding danger in cities.

skills.name: Common Etiquette
skills.description: How to behave around ordinary people in varied regional contexts.

skills.name: Noble Etiquette
skills.description: Court behavior, forms of address, political navigation at the upper levels.

skills.name: Law and Legal Knowledge
skills.description: Understanding of regional legal systems. Literacy helps but is not required.

skills.name: Administration
skills.description: Running institutions, managing records, organizing complex operations.

skills.name: Literacy
skills.description: Reading and writing. Rarer than modern players expect. Opens administrative, clerical, scholarly paths.
skills.notes: Not a physical skill — listed here as a cognitive fundamental

skills.name: Numeracy
skills.description: Accounting, measurement, calculation. Separate from general literacy.

skills.name: Additional Language
skills.description: Each additional language is a separate skill. Multiple languages available based on continent.

skills.name: History — General
skills.description: Broad historical knowledge. The Five Turnings, major powers, general timeline.

skills.name: History — Regional
skills.description: Specific deep knowledge of a region or power's history. Multiple instances.

skills.name: Religious Lore
skills.description: Knowledge of faith practices, hierarchies, history. Can be multiple faiths.

skills.name: Heraldry and Lineage
skills.description: Recognizing noble houses, ranks, political affiliations by symbol and dress.

skills.name: Natural Philosophy
skills.description: Systematic observation of the natural world. Proto-science.

skills.name: Cartography
skills.description: Making and reading maps. Rare. Highly valuable.

skills.name: Architecture
skills.description: Building design and structural knowledge. Siege engineering prereq.

skills.name: Astronomy
skills.description: Celestial observation, calendar systems, navigation application.

skills.name: Mineralogy
skills.description: Identifying ores, stones, gems. Mine assaying.

skills.name: Lockpicking
skills.description: Bypassing mechanical locks. Requires tools.

skills.name: Sleight of Hand
skills.description: Pickpocketing, palming, misdirection.

skills.name: Stealth
skills.description: Moving without being detected. Terrain-specific elements.

skills.name: Tailing
skills.description: Following someone without being noticed.

skills.name: Information Brokering
skills.description: Buying, selling, and trading information. Network-building.

skills.name: Forgery
skills.description: Creating false documents. Requires literacy.

skills.name: Disguise
skills.description: Changing apparent identity. Practical rather than theatrical.

skills.name: Smuggling
skills.description: Moving contraband. Route knowledge, concealment, bribery.

skill_families.description: Medical skill without training is dangerous. With it, life-saving.

skills.name: Wound Treatment
skills.description: Cleaning, binding, basic surgical closure. Prevents infection.

skills.name: Disease Recognition
skills.description: Identifying illness, understanding contagion, quarantine judgment.

skills.name: Herbalism
skills.description: Medicinal plant knowledge. Pain management, infection treatment, fever reduction.

skills.name: Surgery
skills.description: Removing arrows, amputations, internal wound management. Brutal and dangerous without serious skill.

skills.name: Midwifery
skills.description: Childbirth assistance. Highly valued in every settlement.

skills.name: Bone Setting
skills.description: Fracture management. Improperly set bones cause permanent disability.

skills.name: Apothecary
skills.description: Compound medicines, poisons knowledge, drug preparation. Literacy helps.

skills.name: Seamanship
skills.description: General ship handling, sailing, rigging management.

skills.name: Maritime Navigation
skills.description: Chart reading, celestial navigation at sea, coastal piloting.

skills.name: Fishing
skills.description: Net, line, trap fishing. Coastal and river variants.

skills.name: Shipwright — Repair
skills.description: Maintaining vessels at sea. Emergency repair.

skills.name: Harbor Piloting
skills.description: Guiding ships through complex harbor approaches. Licensed profession in major ports.

skills.name: Diving
skills.description: Underwater work — salvage, hull inspection. Physically demanding and skill-intensive.

skills.name: Cooking
skills.description: Preparing food. Quality affects morale and nutrition. Can be a profession.

skills.name: Baking
skills.description: Bread and pastry. Separate from general cooking.

skills.name: Butchering
skills.description: Animal processing for food. Efficiency and waste reduction.

skills.name: Food Preservation
skills.description: Salting, smoking, pickling, fermenting. Critical for winter survival.

skills.name: Cheesemaking
skills.description: Dairy processing. High-value trade good.

skill_families.description: These are condition meters, not skills. Included here for completeness.

conditions.name: Hunger
conditions.description: Daily need. Neglect degrades performance, then health, then death.

conditions.name: Thirst
conditions.description: Daily need. Degrades faster than hunger.

conditions.name: Sleep
conditions.description: Daily need. Cognitive and physical performance degrade with deprivation.

conditions.name: Hygiene
conditions.description: Accumulates over time. Affects disease risk, social reception, wound infection rate.

conditions.name: Wound System
conditions.description: Not hit points. Wounds are location-specific with specific penalties.
special_rules: Wounds heal in real time — days to weeks
Serious wounds may leave permanent minor penalties
Infections can kill slower than the original wound

conditions.name: Morale and Resolve
conditions.description: Witnessing atrocities, prolonged starvation, loss of companions accumulate into a morale stat. A broken person makes poor decisions.
conditions.notes: Practical combat and social modifier. Not a mental illness system. Humans have limits — this reflects that.
